## Checklist

- [ ] `az bicep build --file main.bicep` passes with no errors
- [ ] Bicep linter warnings reviewed (check `bicepconfig.json` rules)
- [ ] No secrets, passwords, or personal identity values committed
- [ ] `deploy-config.cfg` or `main.bicepparam` updated if new parameters were added
- [ ] README updated if user-facing behavior changed
- [ ] Tested via What-If or full deployment (paste run link if available)
